# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

# CloudFormation template for a multi-subnet VPC with route tables, internet gateway and NAT gateways 
Resources:
   InternetGateway: # Define the resource name as "Internet Gateway" (required)
     Type : 'AWS::EC2::InternetGateway'    # required type for AWS CloudFormation resources in YAML files. Not all services support this feature - you need to check your service provider documentation if it supports other features like VPC Flow Logs 
       Properties: {}   # optional properties (e.g., map of key-value pairs) or a block containing one or more child elements, e.g.: 'Key1' : { ... } for the InternetGateway resource here can be omitted if not necessary and is just used to provide an example
   
  VPC: # Define your main vpc with all resources (required), you should use a unique name that doesn’t conflict or have any special meaning in YAML files. In this case 'MyVPC' will suffice but it could be another resource-friendly identifier like "myvpc"
    Type : AWS::EC2::VPC   # This line is required for the CloudFormation to recognize that you are creating a VPC, not an EC2 instance or other service. 
      Properties: { ... }    
        DependsOn: InternetGateway          # You can specify dependencies on resources here (optional) e.g., "InternetGateway" depends_on the subnet creation and so forth in this example  
    Subnets : [...]             # List of all your VPC's child resource names or identifiers, required for CloudFormation to know what dependencies exist between resources (optional)  e.g., ["Subnet-1", "Subnet-2"] if you have two subnets in the same vpc
    Tags: [...]                # List of tags that will be associated with all child AWS resource(s), required for CloudFormation to organize your resources (optional)  e.g., ["Key=Value","Another Key=Yet Another Value"] if you have two different sets or more than one tag set
